overview.description: The FT Vest Nasdaq-100 Moderate Buffer ETF-February (QMFE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on QQQ ETF over a specific holding period. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral. QMFE was launched on Feb 21, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.
